example:
We need to make a decision today.
It's a hard decision to make.
She made the right decision.

Let's take a break.
I took a short break.
You should take a break.

Have you done your homework?
I do my homework after dinner.
She does homework every evening.

I have breakfast at seven.
Let's have breakfast together.
He skipped breakfast.

Please pay attention.
Pay attention to detail.
He wasn't paying attention.

Everyone makes mistakes.
I made a small mistake.
Don't make the same mistake.

Can you take a photo of us?
She took a photo.
Let's take a photo here.

We do business worldwide.
It's a pleasure to do business.
They do business online.

meaning: do what you said you would
example:
She always keeps her promises.
Keep your promise.
He kept his promise.

He makes friends easily.
I made friends at work.
It's hard to make friends.

Take care on the roads.
Take care of yourself.
Take care, see you soon.

Have fun at the party!
We had a lot of fun.
The kids are having fun.

Planning ahead saves time.
This saves a lot of time.
To save time, take the train.

Don't spend too much money.
She spends money on books.
We spent money on a holiday.

Wear a coat or you'll catch a cold.
I caught a cold last week.
He catches colds easily.

Can you give me some advice?
She gave good advice.
I'd like to give you advice.

You're making good progress.
We made progress today.
Slow but steady progress.

Sometimes you have to take a risk.
She took a big risk.
Don't take that risk.

Please make an effort to be on time.
He made a real effort.
Make an effort to listen.

I take notes in every class.
She took detailed notes.
Take notes during the meeting.
